criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
candidate module scaffold activates on held-out composition
candidate learns primitive module tables before composition
candidate reaches minimum first-heldout composition accuracy
candidate reaches minimum total heldout composition accuracy
candidate improves over raw v1.8 CRA on first heldout compositions
composition shams are worse than candidate
candidate beats combo memorization on first heldout compositions
candidate beats best selected standard baseline on first heldout compositions

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Software diagnostic only: explicit reusable-module composition scaffold, not internal/native CRA composition, routing, planning, language, or hardware evidence.

summary.claim_boundary: Software diagnostic only: explicit reusable-module composition scaffold, not internal/native CRA composition, routing, planning, language, or hardware evidence.
